response: The April investor update highlights crossing 10K monthly active users (MAU), closing an $8M Series A term sheet at a $40M pre-money valuation, and hiring a VP of Sales, along with metrics including $85K MRR (+12% MoM), a $120K monthly burn rate, and 11 months of runway post-raise. Fundraising is set to close on May 10, as noted by the founders.
